name: Italian Meat Sauce Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and crumble the sausage.
2. In a large kettle or Dutch oven, brown the Italian sausage and ground beef with salt, pepper, and minced garlic until fully cooked.
3. Drain excess fat from meat mixture.
4. Add onion and carrot to the meat mixture. Blend onion and carrot with water, then drain off water before adding them back to the meat in the kettle.
5. Continue cooking with the meat mixture. Stir in basil, chili powder, thyme, cauliflower, broccoli, tomato puree, and tomato paste.
6. Gradually add 8 cups of water while stirring until well combined.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 8 hours.
8. Skim off any fat that rises to the surface during cooking.
9. Transfer into eight or nine one-pint containers.
10. Seal and label each container as "Italian Meat Sauce Mix."
11. Freeze for use within six months.
